title: Chester!
description: A little Chester from Don't Starve, it sits on your shoulder.
body:
A craftable Chester from Don't Starve!           
It has no use, all it does is sits on your shoulder.         
Cool cosmetic!           

![The crafting recipe for Chester.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e98bd21e0e13f8fca536f6d6994d6ed3bcb6ae0.png)
